description: JSON2Video is a service for creating and rendering videos programmatically from JSON definitions. It supports reusable templates, media management, AI voiceovers, subtitles, and automation workflows for video generation.
summary: JSON2Video exposes a REST API at https://api.json2video.com/v2 with published OpenAPI specs, plus an npm-distributed `json2video` CLI and a stdio MCP server shipped in `@json2video/cli`; all use a JSON2Video API key.
